notes: Audit report dated December 4, 2023 for fiscal year ended March 31, 2021 — significantly delayed audit. Prior year (2020) was audited by a different auditor. No budget was prepared for the current fiscal year. Hagwilget Rock Society/Trust revenue dropped significantly from $1,551,292 in 2020 to $171,974 in 2021. Ottawa Trust Funds (held by federal government) reported separately as both financial asset and equity component. Long-term debt includes All Nations Trust Company mortgage at 1.67% and Royal Bank equipment loan at 5.99%. Total government transfers estimated as ISC + FNHA + FNESC + CMHC = 2356415 + 910337 + 499908 + 28440 + 458163 (BC Gaming LP included as government transfer) = 4253263; however BC Gaming LP may be OSR; conservative estimate uses ISC+FNHA+FNESC+CMHC only = 3793100; used ISC+FNHA+CMHC+FNESC as government transfers.
